name: supabase-schema-from-requirements
description: Design Supabase Postgres schema from business requirements with migrations, RLS, and types. Use when translating specifications into database tables, creating migration files, adding Row Level Security policies, or generating TypeScript types from schema. Trigger with phrases like "supabase schema", "design database supabase", "schema from requirements", "supabase migration", "supabase tables from spec".
